fa-usb-drive.appearanceId: a small rectangular USB flash drive body with a connector plug protruding from one end and a status indicator notch or cap on the body; compact thumb drive silhouette with a USB plug end
fa-usb-drive.functionalityId: represents a USB flash drive or portable storage device; indicates removable media, data transfer, or file storage via USB
fa-usb-drive.intentId: manage or access files on a USB drive; indicate portable storage or data transfer in a file management or device interface

fa-usd.appearanceId: an uppercase letter S with a single or double vertical line passing through the center vertically; dollar sign glyph with a vertical stroke through an S curve
fa-usd.functionalityId: represents US dollar currency or a monetary value; indicates a price, cost, or financial amount in a currency context
fa-usd.intentId: display or input a US dollar amount; indicate pricing or financial value in a payment or e-commerce interface

fa-usd-circle.appearanceId: a circular badge containing a dollar sign symbol centered within the circle boundary; round disc outline enclosing a dollar sign glyph
fa-usd-circle.functionalityId: represents a dollar amount enclosed in a circular badge; indicates a monetary value, pricing, or currency in a compact circular form
fa-usd-circle.intentId: display a currency amount or price in a compact circular badge; indicate financial transactions or pricing in a payment interface

fa-usd-square.appearanceId: a square or rounded-rectangle badge containing a dollar sign symbol centered within; square outline enclosing a dollar sign glyph
fa-usd-square.functionalityId: represents a dollar amount enclosed in a square badge; indicates a monetary value or currency in a compact square form
fa-usd-square.intentId: display a currency amount or price in a square badge; indicate financial transactions or pricing in a payment or retail interface

fa-user.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a circular head and rounded shoulder arc below; generic person outline with head circle and curved torso base
fa-user.functionalityId: represents a generic user or person account; indicates a user profile or individual account in an interface
fa-user.intentId: access a user profile or account; represent a person or individual in a contacts or authentication interface

fa-user-alien.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a large oval alien head featuring oversized eyes instead of a normal human head, paired with the standard shoulder arc; alien-headed person outline with large cranium and shoulder base
fa-user-alien.functionalityId: represents an extraterrestrial or alien character in user form; indicates a sci-fi, fantasy, or non-human user persona
fa-user-alien.intentId: select or display an alien or sci-fi user avatar; represent a non-human character type in a game or creative profile interface

fa-user-alt.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a circular head and a full rounded body or bust shown more prominently than the standard user; alternate person outline with a slightly fuller or centered figure shape
fa-user-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternate version of a user or person symbol; indicates a user profile or account with a slightly different visual emphasis
fa-user-alt.intentId: access a user profile or account using an alternate person symbol; represent an individual in an interface that requires a distinct user icon variant

fa-user-alt-slash.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a circular head and body, overlaid with a diagonal slash line cutting through the figure; alternate person outline with a negation slash across the silhouette
fa-user-alt-slash.functionalityId: represents a blocked, removed, or unavailable user; indicates user removal, account deactivation, or no-user state
fa-user-alt-slash.intentId: remove or deactivate a user account; indicate that a user is blocked or unavailable in an admin or account management interface

fa-user-astronaut.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a large round astronaut helmet enclosing the head and a spacesuit body with visible suit details at the shoulders; space-suited person outline with a spherical helmet
fa-user-astronaut.functionalityId: represents an astronaut or space explorer persona; indicates a space-themed user role or character in a sci-fi or space application
fa-user-astronaut.intentId: select or display an astronaut user avatar; represent a space or aerospace role in a profile or game character interface

fa-user-beard-bolt.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a circular head featuring a beard shape along the jaw, and a lightning bolt badge overlaid on the shoulder area; bearded person outline with a lightning bolt accent
fa-user-beard-bolt.functionalityId: represents a bearded user with an energy or power attribute; indicates a stylized or powered-up user persona
fa-user-beard-bolt.intentId: select or display a bearded user with a power attribute; represent a distinctive user persona in a profile or character selection interface

fa-user-bounty-hunter.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a wide-brimmed bounty hunter hat atop the head and a rugged or armored shoulder outline; person outline wearing a wide-brimmed hat suggestive of a bounty hunter
fa-user-bounty-hunter.functionalityId: represents a bounty hunter character or role; indicates a pursuit, capture, or reward-based user persona in a game or themed interface
fa-user-bounty-hunter.intentId: select or display a bounty hunter user avatar; represent a hunter or tracker role in a game or themed application

fa-user-check.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a circular head and shoulder arc, accompanied by a checkmark badge to the lower right of the figure; person outline with a confirmation checkmark overlay
fa-user-check.functionalityId: represents a verified, confirmed, or approved user; indicates user verification, account approval, or identity confirmation
fa-user-check.intentId: verify or approve a user account; indicate that a user has been confirmed or validated in an admin or onboarding interface

fa-user-chef.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a tall chef hat (toque) on top of the head and shoulder arc below; person outline wearing a tall cylindrical chef hat
fa-user-chef.functionalityId: represents a chef or culinary professional user role; indicates a cooking, food service, or kitchen management persona
fa-user-chef.intentId: assign or display a chef role to a user; represent a culinary professional in a restaurant, recipe, or food service interface

fa-user-clock.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a circular head and shoulder arc, accompanied by a small clock badge to the lower right showing clock hands; person outline with a clock overlay badge
fa-user-clock.functionalityId: represents a user with a time-based status or scheduled activity; indicates user availability, shift timing, or time-tracked user activity
fa-user-clock.intentId: track or display a user's time or schedule; indicate a timed user session or shift in a scheduling or time management interface

fa-user-cog.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a circular head and shoulder arc, accompanied by a gear or cog badge to the lower right of the figure; person outline with a gear settings badge overlay
fa-user-cog.functionalityId: represents a user with administrative or configuration access; indicates user settings, account configuration, or admin controls
fa-user-cog.intentId: access user account settings or configuration; manage administrative preferences for a user in a settings or admin interface

fa-user-cowboy.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a wide-brimmed cowboy hat on the head and shoulder arc below; person outline wearing a wide-brimmed western cowboy hat
fa-user-cowboy.functionalityId: represents a cowboy or western-themed user persona; indicates a western character role or themed avatar
fa-user-cowboy.intentId: select or display a cowboy user avatar; represent a western or ranch-themed character in a game or themed profile interface

fa-user-crown.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a decorative crown shape atop the circular head and shoulder arc below; person outline wearing a crown above the head
fa-user-crown.functionalityId: represents a premium, admin, or royalty-tier user; indicates a top-tier, VIP, or administrator user role
fa-user-crown.intentId: designate or display a premium or admin user status; represent a VIP or privileged account in a membership or admin interface

fa-user-doctor-hair.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette of a doctor with short hair visible on the circular head, wearing a stethoscope or medical accessory and short hair detail; person outline with short hair and a medical profession indicator
fa-user-doctor-hair.functionalityId: represents a male or short-haired doctor or medical professional; indicates a healthcare provider with a short-hair appearance variant
fa-user-doctor-hair.intentId: identify or select a short-haired doctor user persona; represent a medical professional in a healthcare or telemedicine interface

fa-user-doctor-hair-long.functionalityId: represents a long-haired doctor or medical professional; indicates a healthcare provider with a long-hair appearance variant
fa-user-doctor-hair-long.intentId: identify or select a long-haired doctor user persona; represent a medical professional with long hair in a healthcare or telemedicine interface

fa-user-graduate.functionalityId: represents a student who has graduated or an academic user role; indicates graduation, educational achievement, or alumni status

fa-user-group.appearanceId: two overlapping human figure silhouettes side by side, each with a circular head and shoulder arc, the second figure slightly behind and offset to the right; pair of overlapping person outlines forming a group
fa-user-group.functionalityId: represents a group of users or a team; indicates a shared user group, team membership, or multi-person context

fa-user-group-simple.appearanceId: two simplified overlapping human figure silhouettes with minimal detail, each with a circular head and arc torso, slightly offset to suggest a group; simplified pair of overlapping person outlines
fa-user-group-simple.functionalityId: represents a simplified group of users or team; indicates a streamlined multi-user or group context
fa-user-group-simple.intentId: access or display a simplified user group or team; represent a group in a minimal or compact interface context

fa-user-hair.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a visible short hair style rendered on the circular head and the standard shoulder arc below; person outline with short hair detail on the head
fa-user-hair.functionalityId: represents a user with a generic short hair style; indicates a basic hair-variant persona
fa-user-hair.intentId: select or display a user avatar with short hair; represent a hair-styled persona in a profile or character customization interface

fa-user-hair-buns.functionalityId: represents a user with a hair buns hairstyle; indicates a hair-bun variant persona or avatar
fa-user-hair-buns.intentId: select or display a user avatar with hair buns; represent a hair-bun styled persona in a profile or character customization interface

fa-user-hair-long.functionalityId: represents a user with long flowing hair; indicates a long-hair variant persona or avatar
fa-user-hair-long.intentId: select or display a user avatar with long hair; represent a long-haired persona in a profile or character customization interface

fa-user-hard-hat.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a rounded hard hat (construction helmet) on top of the circular head and shoulder arc below; person outline wearing a protective hard hat
fa-user-hard-hat.functionalityId: represents a construction worker, engineer, or safety-role user; indicates a hard hat-wearing professional in a construction or industrial context
fa-user-hard-hat.intentId: assign or display a construction or safety worker user role; represent a worker with PPE in a construction or workplace safety interface

fa-user-hoodie.functionalityId: represents a casual or anonymous user wearing a hoodie; indicates an informal or incognito user persona
fa-user-hoodie.intentId: select or display a hoodie-wearing user avatar; represent an informal or casual persona in a profile or character interface

fa-user-injured.functionalityId: represents an injured or incapacitated user or patient; indicates injury status, medical leave, or patient record in a health interface
fa-user-injured.intentId: mark or display an injured user or patient status; represent an injured person in a medical, insurance, or health management interface

fa-user-lock.functionalityId: represents a locked or restricted user account; indicates account lockout, restricted access, or user security enforcement

fa-user-md.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette wearing a stethoscope draped around the neck area, with a circular head and shoulder arc; person outline with a stethoscope accessory around the neck
fa-user-md.functionalityId: represents a medical doctor or physician user role; indicates a doctor profile, medical professional account, or clinical staff

fa-user-ninja.functionalityId: represents a ninja character or stealth-role user persona; indicates a covert, anonymous, or agile character type
fa-user-ninja.intentId: select or display a ninja user avatar; represent a stealth or martial arts character in a game or themed profile interface

fa-user-nurse.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette wearing a nurse cap with a cross emblem atop the circular head and shoulder arc below; person outline with a traditional nurse cap on the head
fa-user-nurse.functionalityId: represents a nurse or nursing professional user role; indicates a nursing staff account, patient care role, or clinical staff

fa-user-nurse-hair-long.functionalityId: represents a long-haired nurse or nursing professional; indicates a nursing role with a long-hair appearance variant

fa-user-pen.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a circular head and shoulder arc, accompanied by a pen or pencil badge to the lower right of the figure; person outline with a pen edit badge overlay
fa-user-pen.functionalityId: represents editing a user profile or annotating a user record; indicates profile editing or user data modification

fa-user-pilot.functionalityId: represents an airline pilot or aviation professional user role; indicates a pilot profile or aviation crew member
fa-user-pilot.intentId: identify or display a pilot user role; represent an aviation professional or flight crew member in a flight or aviation interface

fa-user-plus.functionalityId: represents adding or inviting a new user to a group or system; indicates user creation, invitation, or adding a contact

fa-user-police.functionalityId: represents a police officer or law enforcement user role; indicates an officer profile or law enforcement persona
fa-user-police.intentId: identify or display a police officer user role; represent a law enforcement professional in a public safety or security interface

fa-user-police-tie.intentId: identify or display a formally uniformed police officer role; represent a senior law enforcement officer in a public safety or security interface

fa-user-robot.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette with a rectangular or angular robot head with antenna on top replacing the circular human head, and the standard shoulder arc; person outline with a robotic square head and antenna
fa-user-robot.functionalityId: represents a robot, bot, or automated user persona; indicates a bot account, AI agent, or automated process in a system

fa-user-secret.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette wearing a wide-brimmed fedora hat, with a collar turned up and the face obscured suggesting a spy or incognito appearance; person outline with a spy fedora and raised collar hiding the face
